internships.stipend_range: Rs. 5,000 to Rs. 25,000 per month depending on company
internships.companies: Many placement companies also offer pre-placement internships
internships.note: Students with internship experience have significantly higher placement rates

placement_training.details: Year-round placement training including aptitude, coding, communication, and mock interviews
placement_training.coding_platforms: HackerRank, LeetCode, and CodeChef practice sessions organized
placement_training.soft_skills: Communication and personality development workshops every semester

higher_studies.gate_coaching: GATE coaching support available on campus

scholarship.government: EBC, OBC, SC/ST scholarships available via MahaDBT portal. Apply at cetcell.mahacet.org
scholarship.institute: Merit scholarship for students above 9.0 CGPA — up to Rs. 20,000 per year
scholarship.sports: Sports quota scholarship available for state/national level athletes
scholarship.minority: Minority scholarship available for eligible students
scholarship.deadline: Scholarship applications typically open in September each year
